proven_formulas.name: Replay-Hash Determinism
proven_formulas.statement: Deterministic step-fold replay: equal logs replay to equal final state; folded state equals last of the explicit replay trace.

proven_formulas.name: Scheduler Liveness
proven_formulas.statement: Fair round-robin scheduler: every ready organ eventually ticks (strictly-decreasing Nat ranking measure reaches 0).

proven_formulas.name: Organ Boot-Gate Soundness
proven_formulas.statement: If the boot gate permits an organ, its genome is valid (decidable implication).

proven_formulas.name: Khipu DAG Acyclicity
proven_formulas.statement: Appending the new largest-index node preserves DAG acyclicity (backward-edge invariant).

proven_formulas.name: Unay Receipt Recall
proven_formulas.statement: Insert-then-lookup on the same receipt key returns the inserted value (exact-key recall correctness).

proven_formulas.name: LMDB Durability
proven_formulas.statement: Commit-then-restart-then-read returns the committed value; uncommitted writes are lost on crash (WAL model).

proven_formulas.name: Chaski FIFO Ordering
proven_formulas.statement: Enqueue-batch-then-drain yields send order; head is the oldest message (true FIFO, no tautology).

proven_formulas.name: Wallpa OSS-Only Safety
proven_formulas.statement: Governed-voice admission gate admits only OSS sources; no humanClone or synthetic config is ever admitted.

proven_formulas.name: Wasi-Rikuq Non-Interference
proven_formulas.statement: Advisory non-interference (Goguen-Meseguer 1982): the low view is unchanged by high inputs.

proven_formulas.name: Hatun MCP Idempotency
proven_formulas.statement: MCP request normalizer is idempotent: normalizing twice equals normalizing once.

proven_formulas.name: Ayni Reciprocity Conservation
proven_formulas.statement: Event-sourcing replay invariant: balance reciprocity is conserved; tit-for-tat parity (Axelrod-Hamilton).

proven_formulas.name: Kuramoto Phase-Coupling Boundedness
proven_formulas.statement: Discrete additive coupling is bounded and superposes over an organ set. CAVEAT: additive fragment only, NOT nonlinear Kuramoto synchronisation.

proven_formulas.name: Wayra Hash-Chain Verification
proven_formulas.statement: Hash-chain verification is sound by induction: a verified chain has every link consistent.

proven_formulas.name: Rekor Merkle Inclusion
proven_formulas.statement: Merkle inclusion checker is sound (structural). Binding form (equal roots => equal leaves) is AXIOM-GATED on declared `h2_collision_resistant`.

proven_formulas.name: Sentra Immune Completeness
proven_formulas.statement: Immune cross-cut completeness: 8 gates cover all 8 enumerated threats; gate set is exhaustive.

proven_formulas.name: Three-Vertical Isolation
proven_formulas.statement: The three verticals are pairwise disjoint (isolation by construction).

proven_formulas.name: Reed-Solomon RS(10,6) Recovery
proven_formulas.statement: RS(10,6) parity arithmetic: data is recoverable iff at least 6 of 10 shards survive (tolerates 4 erasures).

proven_formulas.name: Bekenstein Entropy Budget
proven_formulas.statement: Entropy budget is additive and monotone over a region partition; each region <= total. CAVEAT: additive scaffolding only, NOT the full Bekenstein bound S <= 2*pi*k*R*E/(hbar*c).

proven_formulas.name: Mobile Input Equivalence
proven_formulas.statement: Touch and pointer inputs are equivalent under the normalization map (decidable and sound).

proven_formulas.name: Genome Validator Totality
proven_formulas.statement: The genome validator is total over Fin 16: every organ validates.

proven_formulas.name: Khipu Emit Monotonicity
proven_formulas.statement: Emit appends to the sequence log with strictly increasing sequence numbers (monotone emit).

proven_formulas.name: DSSE Verifiable Attribution
proven_formulas.statement: A DSSE signature that verifies attributes the message to the key. AXIOM-GATED on declared `ecdsa_unforgeable`.

proven_formulas.name: Lambda-Aggregator Uniqueness
proven_formulas.statement: CONJECTURE 1 (NOT a theorem). Unconditional uniqueness is FALSE under A1-A5 (maxAgg counterexample). Conditional `lambda_unique_of_factors` IS proved; unconditional uniqueness closes only under declared axiom A6_bisymmetric.
